questionHtml:
Pasteur carried out a series of experiments that provided strong evidence against a widely supported theory. What was this theory?

A. Endosymbiosis

B. Spontaneous generation

C. Conservative replication of DNA

D. Evolution

meta.title: Pasteur carried out a series of experiments that provided strong evidence against a widely supported theory. What was this theory? A. Endosymbiosis B. Spontaneous generation C. Con
